routines.title: Advanced Dumbbell Muscle Hypertrophy Program
routines.overview: This advanced 4-day dumbbell-only program is meticulously designed for muscle hypertrophy, utilizing an upper/lower split performed twice weekly. Each session focuses on compound movements followed by targeted isolation exercises, emphasizing progressive overload and impeccable form to stimulate comprehensive muscle growth across all major muscle groups.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Keep shoulders back and down, control the negative.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a flat back, pull elbows towards the ceiling.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press (Seated)
exercises.coachingCue: Press upwards without locking elbows, keep core tight.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Allow a full stretch at the bottom, squeeze biceps at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows close to head, fully extend without locking.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
exercises.coachingCue: Lead with elbows, slight bend in arms, stop at shoulder height.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Keep chest up, push knees out, go as deep as comfortable.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend, feel stretch in hamstrings.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunges
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain balance, ensure front knee doesn't go past toes.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Calf Raises (Standing)
exercises.coachingCue: Full range of motion, squeeze at the top, control the negative.

exercises.name: Plank (Bodyweight)
exercises.coachingCue: Keep body in a straight line, engage core and glutes.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on deep breathing and gentle movements, targeting major muscle groups.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press
exercises.coachingCue: Angle bench to 30-45 degrees, focus on upper chest contraction.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Renegade Row
exercises.coachingCue: Keep hips stable and parallel to the floor, minimize torso rotation.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Arnold Press
exercises.coachingCue: Rotate palms inward at the bottom, outward at the top, controlled movement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curls
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows tucked in, focus on brachialis and forearm engagement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Triceps Extension (Skullcrushers)
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows fixed, extend arms fully without locking.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Flyes
exercises.coachingCue: Bend forward at hips, squeeze shoulder blades together, focus on rear delts.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Hold dumbbells at shoulders, keep torso upright, drive through heels.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a flat back, extend free leg straight back for balance, control the descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Ups
exercises.coachingCue: Use a sturdy box/bench, drive through the heel of the stepping foot.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Glute Bridge
exercises.coachingCue: Place dumbbell across hips, drive hips up, squeeze glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Farmer's Walk
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain tall posture, shoulders back, engage core, walk with purpose.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on deep breathing and gentle movements, targeting major muscle groups.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on deep breathing and gentle movements, targeting major muscle groups.

routines.title: Mock Intermediate Muscle gain Program
routines.overview: A customized 4-day routine utilizing gym exercises, tailored for intermediate level focusing on muscle gain. (GEMINI MOCK MODE)

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bring dumbbells to mid-chest level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Pull dumbbell toward your hip.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lock core, press overhead without leaning back.

exercises.name: Barbell Squats
exercises.coachingCue: Drive knees out, keep chest upright.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at the hips, keep back straight.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coachingCue: Control the descent, do not lock knees.

exercises.name: HIIT Burpees
exercises.coachingCue: Explode upward on the jump.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.coachingCue: Keep hips low, drive knees fast.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.coachingCue: Pump arms, bring knees to waist level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bring dumbbells to mid-chest level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.coachingCue: Pull dumbbell toward your hip.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lock core, press overhead without leaning back.

exercises.name: Foam Rolling / Static Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Breathe deeply, hold stretches for 30s.

exercises.coachingCue: Breathe deeply, hold stretches for 30s.

routines.title: Intermediate 4-Day Gym Routine for Muscle Gain (Upper/Lower Split)
routines.overview: This program is tailored for intermediate lifters focused on muscle gain, utilizing a 4-day Upper/Lower split. It integrates compound movements for strength development with targeted isolation exercises to stimulate hypertrophy across all major muscle groups, promoting balanced and effective progress.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Keep chest up, slight arch, press through your heels.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain a flat back, pull towards your lower abs.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Brace core, press straight up, lock out elbows.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coachingCue: Squeeze shoulder blades, pull bar to upper chest.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows tucked, control both the concentric and eccentric phases.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.coachingCue: Isolate triceps, keep elbows fixed by your sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Maintain upright torso, knees out, go below parallel.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at the hips, keep a slight bend in knees, feel stretch in hamstrings.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coachingCue: Keep lower back pressed, do not lock out knees at the top.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on hamstring contraction, control the release.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Full range of motion, squeeze at the top, stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Keep body in a straight line, engage core, no sagging hips.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing, focus on gentle movement and holding stretches for 20-30 seconds.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on chest contraction, keep shoulders back and down.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coachingCue: Pull with your back, squeeze shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Lead with elbows, raise dumbbells to shoulder height, slight bend in elbows.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.coachingCue: Pull rope towards your face, externally rotate shoulders.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Keep palms facing each other throughout the movement.

exercises.name: Overhead Dumbbell Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows close to head, control the eccentric phase.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Squeeze quadriceps at the top, control the negative.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.coachingCue: Drive through heels, squeeze glutes hard at the top, pause.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Keep chest up, elbows inside knees, maintain a neutral spine.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.coachingCue: Step forward, drop back knee towards the ground, maintain balance.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Focus on deep stretch and peak contraction.

exercises.name: Cable Crunches
exercises.coachingCue: Crunch with your abs, not your arms, exhale as you contract.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing, focus on gentle movement and holding stretches for 20-30 seconds.

exercises.name: Active Recovery Stretching
exercises.coachingCue: Deep breathing, focus on gentle movement and holding stretches for 20-30 seconds.
